title: Sh*tpost
description: A Stupid Mod based around a Bunch of Stupid Sh*t!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/098a0aeda16ab62730490adc3e4bed659cc71227.png)

### Adds a lot of foods and drinks ![food](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a825f137f88707d8de49733bc7506b0c21361995.png) ### Adds Groan Tubes and more funny instruments ![funny noise makers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b172cada6819b3645d510fe8dcd76a18843bb16.png)
How to craft ### Groan Tubes: Wool Color corresponds to the groan tube color ![tube crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e3a3a51a5a407ffdfd1406a6dffe1764c08b373_0.webp) Wool Color corresponds to the groan tube color ### Air Horn: ![air horn crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69c0da488c01e77b746f147a8cf361fa9323d8b9.png) ### Bike Horn: ![bike horn crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d872e66211ffec7634cd1513f0e533f98a7ba035.png) ### Clown Horn: ![clown horn crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6e345af3bedf869a26217037d6f282daf9ce19a.png)
### Adds a form of currency called Momens ( ∫ ) ![momens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04a69a93bb6adb7100a3cdcfec7a1aeac893ad6d.png) ![momen stacks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a17fc0366d77a3c12bcc078b55d17569abf0212c.png) ### Adds the backrooms ![Backrooms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f59818585166c8abb3bf288eae24fd970ae023e5.png) ### And more ![other stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f67063ef194d24f843ab8eab526372842d79e15.png)
